text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's from Helios. "This ramen is 645"…?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I mean, it does look good, but only 645 yen? "Sounds like a scam."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh wait, I see it now! That's good! 
"Thx 4 the info."
